formatVersion.description: Manifest format. Current runtime understands 2. Absent = 1 (legacy).

id.description: Pack namespace. All your ids become '<id>:<Name>' and resolve to the game row '<id>_<Name>'.

requiresSmith.description: Semver range of PalSmith, e.g. ">=0.2" or "^1.0.0". A bare "0.1" reads as ">=0.1.0".

depends.description: Hard dependencies (packId -> range). Unmet = pack inactive.

recommends.description: Soft dependencies (packId -> range). Unmet = warning only.

breaks.description: Hard conflicts (packId -> range). Present = pack inactive.

provides.description: Optional authoritative list of content ids ('mypack:Thing') this pack provides.

homepage.description: URL of the pack's repository or mod page.

dependencies.description: DEPRECATED: use 'depends' (map of id -> range). Kept for v0.1 packs.
